data.title: OraSure to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Earnings Call on May 6th
data.description: A company known as OraSure Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSUR) based in Bethlehem, Pa., is set to host its routine earnings conference call discussing the financial results for the first quarter of 2026 along with key business updates. This event is scheduled for May 6, 2026, at 5 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: Avis Budget Group to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: A conference call has been scheduled to discuss the results on April 29, 2026. This call is anticipated to provide insights regarding key figures and performance metrics. Participants are encouraged to join the call to gain a comprehensive understanding of the results achieved. This event is crucial for stakeholders to stay informed about the company's progress and future prospects. Mark your calendars and ensure your presence on this significant occasion to delve into the details and engage in discussions about the outcomes.

data.title: Diana Shipping Inc. Announces Date for Its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: In Athens, Greece on April 22, 2026, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) announced its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for May 28, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The meeting will be held virtually. Shareholders as of April 20, 2026, can attend by accessing the instructions in the Notice of Annual Meeting of Shareholders and accompanying proxy statement on the SEC website at https://www.sec.gov/edgar/browse/?CIK=1318885&owner=exclude or the Company’s website at www.dianashippinginc.com.

data.title: Mueller Water Products Announces Dates for Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Mueller Water Products, Inc. (NYSE: MWA) announced it will reveal its financial results for the second quarter ended March 31, 2026, once U.S. markets close on May 5, 2026. A conference call to review earnings and business outcomes is scheduled for May 6, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The event can be accessed through a webcast on the Investor Relations portion of the Company’s official website www.muellerwaterproducts.com. The webcast will be archived for approximately 90 days post the call for those unable to participate in real-time.

data.title: ServiceNow Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) reported its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The company showcased subscription revenues reaching $3,671 million in Q1 2026, marking a 22% year-over-year growth and 19% growth in constant currency terms. ServiceNow's Chairman and CEO, Bill McDermott, expressed satisfaction with the first quarter performance, surpassing the higher end of the company's guidance. McDermott highlighted the continuous platform development since ServiceNow's inception.

data.title: ServiceNow and Google Cloud unite AI agents for autonomous enterprise operations
data.description: In Las Vegas, ServiceNow and Google Cloud have strengthened their strategic alliance by introducing advanced AI solutions for various sectors. These solutions will particularly focus on enhancing 5G networking, retail operations, and IT systems.

data.title: TridentCare achieves 96% scheduling automation with ServiceNow AI-powered CRM, improving care for millions of patients
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) revealed that TridentCare, the leading provider of portable medical diagnostic services in the US, has opted for the ServiceNow AI Platform to revolutionize its operations. This shift aims to significantly reduce manual coordination in favor of autonomous, AI-powered processes. By leveraging AI agents from ServiceNow, TridentCare seeks to enhance efficiency and reliability in its services by integrating operations from customer orders through the entire process.

data.title: Acquisitions Drive Sales Growth
data.description: Graco Inc. revealed its first-quarter results for the period ending March 27, 2026. The figures, stated in millions, showed a 2% increase in net sales, totaling $540.1 compared to $528.3 from the previous year. Operating earnings were reported at $137.8, a decrease from $144.0, marking a 4% decline. Net earnings followed a similar trend, with $118.5 this year compared to $124.1, representing a 5% decrease. Diluted net earnings per common share were $0.70, down from $0.72 in the prior year, a 3% decrease. Adjusted figures, which are non-GAAP, demonstrated adjusted net earnings of $111.8 compared to $120.

data.title: NY and IL prohibit gov't employees from insider trading on prediction markets amid rise in popularity of political prediction markets.
data.description: Government employees in the states have been prohibited from engaging in trading activities involving insider information. This move comes as prediction markets linked to political events gain traction, leading to a heightened concern about potential misuse of privileged information. The ban aims to address this issue and ensure transparency and fairness in trading practices.

data.title: Getty Images to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: New York, April 22, 2026 - Getty Images Holdings, Inc., a leading global visual content creator and marketplace, will be reporting its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 11, 2026, after the market closes. The company, listed as GETY on the NYSE, will host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results with investors and analysts. This announcement was made today, indicating a keen interest in informing stakeholders about the performance and progress of Getty Images in the first quarter of 2026.

data.title: Tigo Energy Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026 at 4:30 p.m. ET
data.description: In Los Gatos, California, Tigo Energy Inc. (Nasdaq: TYGO), a top provider of smart solar and energy software solutions, will conduct a conference call on May 5, 2026. The call is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern time (1:30 p.m. Pacific time) to review financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. Before the call, a press release containing financial results will be published. The presentation will be led by Tigo management, and a Q&A session will follow.

data.title: Waste Connections Announces Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Toronto, Waste Connections, Inc. (TSX/NYSE: WCN) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.35 U.S. per common share. The dividend payment is scheduled for May 21, 2026, for shareholders of record as of May 6, 2026. The Board plans to reassess the dividend each October, aiming to raise the amount in the long run.

data.title: Costa Rica Brings Together Country Brand Leaders at CIMAP 2026 Pre-Forum, Showcasing Global Leadership in Sustainability
data.description: Representatives from 11 nations have convened in San José to enhance their country brand strategies, with a specific emphasis on sustainability and competitiveness. Costa Rica is showcasing a model of development that successfully merges economic advancement with renowned environmental stewardship on a global scale.

data.title: Energy company Kinder Morgan announces Q1 2026 financial results, showcasing strong performance.
data.description: In an ongoing study, researchers have found that approximately 25% of individuals aged 18-34 have reported experiencing symptoms related to mental health issues. The study, which surveyed over 2,000 participants across various regions, also revealed that 40% of those surveyed had sought professional help for their mental health concerns. Additionally, it was discovered that only 15% of respondents had adequate mental health support in the workplace. These findings underscore the pressing need for improved mental health resources and support, particularly among younger demographics.

data.title: Remitly to Report First Quarter Financial Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Remitly Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: RELY) revealed plans to disclose its first-quarter financial results on May 6, 2026, after the market closes. The company, known for its borderless financial services, will conduct a conference call and live webcast at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time / 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results and engage with financial analysts. The call and webcast details will be available for interested parties to access.
